summary: Comprehensive testing of ArbitrajZ email verification feature completed. All 7 required flows verified successfully: registration creates unverified user, login blocks unverified users with proper message, login page shows resend verification link, verify-email endpoint works with valid token, verification returns access_token for auto-login, resend-verification generates new token, and verified users can login.

minor.issue: Legacy users without is_verified field (like admin created before email verification feature) receive a new verification email instead of 'already verified' message. This is because is_verified defaults to False in resend endpoint check vs True in login endpoint check.

action_items: Consider adding is_verified=true to admin user creation in startup event (server.py line 929-940) to handle legacy user consistency
Add data-testid attributes to RegisterPage form elements for better automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: Email sending via Resend returns false (email_sent: false) because arbitrajz.com domain is not verified in Resend. Token generation works correctly - this is expected per main agent context.

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during testing

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-creates admin user on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email verification feature fully tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_email_verification.py cover: health check, registration creates unverified user, login blocks unverified with 403 error, resend verification endpoint, verify-email endpoint (valid/invalid tokens), verified user login. Frontend flows verified: registration redirects to /check-email, check-email page shows email and resend button, login shows verification error with resend link for unverified users, verify-email page shows spinner during verification then success with auto-redirect to dashboard. MOCKED: Email sending returns false but tokens are generated correctly in MongoDB.
mocked_apis_note: Email sending via Resend - arbitrajz.com domain not verified in Resend dashboard, but token generation and verification endpoints work correctly. email_sent field returns false in registration response.

tests_verified.user_registration_creates_unverified: PASS - Creates user with is_verified=false, stores verification_token in DB
tests_verified.login_fails_for_unverified: PASS - Returns 403 with message 'Please verify your email before logging in'
tests_verified.login_shows_resend_link: PASS - LoginPage displays 'Resend verification email' link when login fails for unverified user
tests_verified.verify_email_with_valid_token: PASS - Sets is_verified=true, clears token, returns access_token for auto-login
tests_verified.verify_email_returns_token: PASS - Response includes access_token and token_type='bearer'
tests_verified.resend_verification_generates_new_token: PASS - Updates verification_token and expiry in DB
tests_verified.verified_user_can_login: PASS - Admin user and verified test users can login successfully
tests_verified.frontend_registration_flow: PASS - Form submission redirects to /check-email page
tests_verified.frontend_check_email_page: PASS - Shows email, resend button works, shows success message
tests_verified.frontend_verify_page_error: PASS - Shows error state for invalid/missing token with 'Request New Verification Link' button
tests_verified.frontend_verify_page_success: PASS - Shows success state, auto-redirects to dashboard after 3 seconds
tests_verified.frontend_auto_login_after_verify: PASS - User is logged in and sees dashboard after verification
